Description.value: Makes POI Scourge's Infestation Beacon contribute to Trader Tier progression by POI tier. Replaces ItemActionStartScourgeQuest with a tier-aware variant that reads the current POI's difficulty tier and routes to quest_scourge_infestation_t1..t6, each carrying add_to_tier_complete=true with matching difficulty_tier. Requires HarmonyX (0_TFP_Harmony) and POI Scourge. EAC must be off.
